title: Able-472
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Able}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image=[[File:Abel.jpg]] |name=Able-472 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{SWE|groups|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{DB|character|able472|Able-472}} |pronouns= |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]{{SWE|characters|jangofett|Jango Fett}} |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' {{C|''Colicoid Annihilator Droid''}} **[[The Muunilinst 10]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|General Kenobi, our cannons are being destroyed!''"
"'Mount up.''"
"'Yes sir!|Able-472 and [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]''}} '''Able-472''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who fought at the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]] as a member of [[The Muunilinst 10]]. During the battle, they were put in charge of the [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] bombarding the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Harnaidan]]. ==Biography== ===Mission to Muunilinst=== {{Quote|ARC troopers, you were selected for this task because you are the best; the elite. You all know what to do.|Obi-Wan Kenobi, to Able-472 and the rest of the Muunilinst 10|}} [[File:ARC_team.png|thumb|left|250px|Able-472, next to [[Fordo|ARC-77]] and an [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha-class]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]].]] [[Cloning/Legends|Born]] on the [[Waterworld/Legends|aquatic]] planet of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] as a clone of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], Able-472 was one of the many clones created to fight in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|21.66 BBY]], 4 [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' wanting to to stop the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] from assisting the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] any futher, the [[Palpatine/Legends|Chancellor]] enlisted [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] Obi-Wan Kenobi and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to launch an assault on the IGBC's headquarters on [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]]. Accepting the mission, and promoting his padawan to the rank of [[Jedi Commander/Legends|commander]], Obi-Wan Kenobi assembled a large invasion force on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].{{CW|1}} Among this invasion force was Able-472, who was assigned to a squad of [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] known as the Muunilinst 10. After departing from Coruscant, Able-472 and the rest of the Muunilinst 10 were given the mission to infiltrate the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Harnaidan]] and disable key enemy defences to allow for the main clone forces to safely invade the city. Once they had learned of their mission and geared up, Able-472 and their squad were assembled by Obi-Wan Kenobi and informed of the importance of their mission's success.{{CW|2}} [[File:CW_Chapter_3.png|thumb|right|250px|[[CT-43/002]], one of Able-472's squadmates, was killed by a [[battle droid assassin]].]] Upon exiting [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], Able-472 loaded up in a modified [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|LAAT]] with blue markings, and headed down to the planet's surface while Skywalker's [[V-19 Torrent starfighter/Legends|fighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] distracted the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems Navy|CIS fleet]]. Once they had reached the planet's surface, Able-472's [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] broke off from the main force and headed towards the centre of the city with little to no opposition. During their flight through the city; however, a [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] [[E-60R missile launcher|launched]] a [[Missile/Legends|rocket]] towards the LAAT and destroyed its [[Engine/Legends|engine]] which caused it to crash. Able-472, now stranded, formed a defensive perimeter around the crashed gunship with the rest of the Muunilinst 10. While waiting on their next set of orders, a group of [[battle droid assassin]]s opened fire on Able's [[Squad/Legends|squad]], killing one of their [[CT-43/002|squadmates]]. [[Fordo|ARC-77]], Able-472's [[Captain/Legends|captain]], ordered the squad to retreat behind the crashed LAAT, and sent two of his men to draw the droids' fire, while one of his troopers [[Target Imager|scanned]] the area for the enemy's position. After finding out where the droids were located, one of the [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|ARC]] troopers used a [[PLX-1/Legends|PLX-1 portable missile launcher]] to destroy the droid snipers hiding within the buildings. The battle won, ARC-77 ordered Able-472 and the rest of their squad to keep moving towards their objective. On their way to the main Separatist [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] emplacement, Able-472 was told to hold their position by ARC-77, as an [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tank]] began firing on the squad's position. Having planned for this; however, one of Able-472's squadmates, an [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]], slid down a rope behind the AAT and climbed inside of it to destroy it. The [[Repulsorlift|repulsor]] [[Tank/Legends|tank]] destroyed, Able-472 and their squad continued their march towards the emplacement. Having finally reached the artillery cannon's location, Able-472 grappled up the side of the tower with their squad and helped destroy the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] guarding it. Once all of the droids were dispatched, Able helped place [[Explosive charge/Legends|explosive charges]] all over the main cannon, and destroyed it from a safe distance.{{CW|3}} ===Infiltrating the command tower=== {{Quote|Let's end this battle, Commander.|Obi-Wan Kenobi, to Able-472's [[Clone Captain|captain]], ARC-77|}} [[File:CW_Chapter_9.png|thumb|left|250px|Able-472 and the Muunilinst 10 attempt to grapple onto Durge.]] With the main Separatist cannon destroyed, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] began breaking through the CIS's forward positions. Terrified, the [[Muun/Legends|Muun]] leaders of the Banking Clan sent the renown bounty hunter [[Durge/Legends|Durge]] to deal with the approaching army. Alongside an army of [[IG lancer droid/Legends|lancer droids]], Durge decimated a large portion of the Republic's clone army, including their [[Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]].{{CW|4}} Witnessing this destruction, Able-472, having been recently put in charge of the artillery, informed [[General/Legends|General]] Obi-Wan Kenobi, who told them and their squadmates to mount up for battle. While Kenobi and a [[Lancer Battalion|battalion]] of [[clone lancer trooper]]s were fighting off Durge and his droids, Able-472, the Muunilinst 10, and another unit of clone troopers headed to the InterGalactic Banking Clan's main command tower to wait for General Kenobi.{{CW|8}} Once the General had arrived, Able-472 and the other clones stormed the command center, destroying the battle droids guarding it, while also capturing the leader of the Banking Clan, [[San Hill/Legends|San Hill]]. However, before they could bring San Hill back, Durge came flying through one of the windows and was immediately shot down and blown up by Able-472 and the rest of the clone forces. Thinking that he was dead, the clones were shocked to find that Durge was still alive, unscathed. After a small skirmish between Obi-Wan and the bounty hunter, a group of clone troopers attempted to grapple onto the [[Gen'Dai/Legends|Gen'Dai]], but were knocked away before they could reach him. Soon after, Obi-Wan Kenobi was consumed by the bounty hunter's body, but was rescued by ARC-77's distraction, which gave the Jedi Master enough time to destroy Durge from the inside using [[The Force/Legends|The Force]].{{CW|9}} Victorious, Able-472 and the rest of the clone forces rounded up the members of the Banking Clan and brought them back to their ''Acclamator''.{{CW|20}} ==Personality and traits== Born as a clone of the Mandalorian bounty hunter Jango Fett, Able-472 stood at a height of 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. During the Battle of Muunilinst, Able-472 wore [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|phase 1 clone trooper armor]] with no discernible markings. He was also equipped with a [[DC-15A blaster rifle/Legends|DC-15A]] [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] which he used to a great extent. Able-472 was shown to be a capable leader, as he was put in charge of overseeing the artillery destroying the CIS's forward positions. On top of being able to lead others, Able-472 was also shown to be an exceptional [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]], as he was assigned to the Muunilinst 10, a clone unit that Jedi General Obi-Wan Kenobi considered to be the best. ==Behind the scenes== Able-472 was created by [[Genndy Tartakovsky]] for the [[2003]] animated television series ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', where he appeared as one of the members of the elite Muunilinst 10. Able-472 wouldn't receive a name until [[June 27]], [[2006]], when [[The New Essential Guide to Droids]] was released and gave the previously unidentified trooper the name "Able-472". Like all clones in ''Star Wars: Clone Wars'', Able-472 is voiced by [[André Sogliuzzo]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Cine-Manga|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Cine-Manga]] *{{CW|2}} {{1st}} *{{CW|3}} *{{CW|8}} *{{CW|9}} *{{CW|20}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' {{1stID|Able 472}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{1stID|Able-472}} *{{DB|character|able472|Able-472}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Able 472 |hu=Able 472 |nl=Able 472 |pl=Able-472 |pt=Legends:Able-472 }} [[Category:Clone troopers]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Members of the Muunilinst 10]]
